title: RKLB Q4 Earnings Loom: Should You Buy the Stock Ahead of Results?
text: With RKLB Q4 earnings approaching, analysts and investors questioned whether the stock was a buy ahead of results. The company's guidance provided Q4 2023 revenue between $65 million and $69 million with GAAP gross margins of 24-26% and non-GAAP margins of 30-32%. The consensus EPS estimate was -$0.07 and the consensus revenue estimate was $61.21 million. 2023 saw 11 launches with expectations for 22 launches in 2024, trending towards a $7.5 million average selling price. Higher operating expenses due to Neutron program investment, workforce expansion, and enhanced cybersecurity for government programs were expected to pressure operating margins. The company had demonstrated a track record of beating estimates in prior quarters.
